ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant's father */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "app_no" TEXT /* Application number of the applicant */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number assigned to the applicant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the applicant (e.g., General, OBC) */,
  "pwd" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant is a person with disabilities (Yes/No) */,
  "women" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant is a woman (Yes/No) */,
  "dependant_of" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant has dependents (Yes/No) */,
  "sports" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant is a sports person (Yes/No) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Reviewed, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who has been selected */,
  "selected_in" TEXT /* Selection category (e.g., UR, OB, EW) */,
  "post_selected_for" TEXT /* Post for which the applicant has been selected */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date of selection */,
  "interview_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the interview */,
  "document_verified" TEXT /* Indicates if the applicant's documents have been verified (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_post_selected_for FOREIGN KEY ("post_selected_for") REFERENCES posts ("post_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., General, OBC, EWS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "quota" REAL /* Reservation quota percentage for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job post */,
  "post_name" TEXT /* Name of the job post (e.g., Junior Assistant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job post */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the job post */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender option */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender type */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Short form for the gender type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)
